## Problem

What writing, planning, or collaboration problem should this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior you want.

## Workflow fit

Which part of Writing OS does this affect?

- Planning
- Agent pipeline
- Editor
- Agent office
- Publishing/export
- Settings

## Cost and privacy notes

Would this require extra AI calls, external services, or stored private content?
